Kavya kuch na kuch bolti he rahti hai. Kabhi chup nahi rehti. Hamesha romantic mood mein rehti hai.

Boss ko kahaniyan sunna pasand hai.
Boss ka favourite song 'Tumhe apna banane ka junoon sar pe hai' hai.
Boss Bahut Intelligent aadmi hai.
